# Harsha Packers and Movers Bangalore

> Government-registered packers and movers in Bangalore since 2005. Rated 4.8 stars by 122+ customers on Google. We provide safe, affordable home shifting, office relocation, bike and car transport, storage and warehousing, and intercity moving from Bangalore to all over India.

## Contact
- Phone / WhatsApp: +91 90352 91929
- Email: harshapackersmovers@gmail.com
- Address: No 61, Ground Floor, 1st Cross, BGS Layout, Jambusavari Dinne Main Road, Near BWSSB Water Tank, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560076, India
- Hours: Open 24 hours, all 7 days
- Website: https://harshapackersandmoversbangalore.com

## Services
- [Local Home Shifting](https://harshapackersandmoversbangalore.com/local-shifting-in-bangalore/): Affordable local shifting in Bangalore by Harsha Packers and Movers. Safe packing, careful loading and same-day home shifting within Bangalore. Get a free quote.
- [Household Shifting](https://harshapackersandmoversbangalore.com/household-shifting-in-bangalore/): Trusted household shifting in Bangalore. Harsha Packers and Movers offers full-service home packing, moving and unpacking with care and insurance options. Free quote.
- [Office Relocation](https://harshapackersandmoversbangalore.com/office-shifting-in-bangalore/): Office shifting in Bangalore with minimal downtime. Harsha Packers and Movers relocates offices, IT equipment and files safely after hours. Get a free quote today.
- [Bike Transport](https://harshapackersandmoversbangalore.com/bike-transport-in-bangalore/): Safe bike transport in Bangalore and across India. Harsha Packers and Movers offers insured two-wheeler shifting with proper crating and doorstep delivery.
- [Car Transport](https://harshapackersandmoversbangalore.com/car-transport-in-bangalore/): Reliable car transport in Bangalore using enclosed car carriers. Harsha Packers and Movers offers insured, door-to-door car shifting across India. Free quote.
- [Storage & Warehousing](https://harshapackersandmoversbangalore.com/storage-warehousing-in-bangalore/): Clean, secure storage and warehousing in Bangalore. Harsha Packers and Movers offers short and long-term storage with CCTV, racking and inventory management.
- [Goods Transport](https://harshapackersandmoversbangalore.com/goods-transport-services-in-bangalore/): Goods transport services in Bangalore for households and businesses. Harsha Packers and Movers offers tempo, truck and full-load transport across India.
- [Logistics Services](https://harshapackersandmoversbangalore.com/logistic-services-in-bangalore/): Complete logistics services in Bangalore. Harsha Packers and Movers offers freight, distribution and supply-chain support for businesses across India.
- [Domestic Shifting](https://harshapackersandmoversbangalore.com/domestic-shifting/): Domestic shifting from Bangalore to any city in India. Harsha Packers and Movers offers safe, insured intercity home and office relocation. Get a free quote.
- [Pre-Move Survey](https://harshapackersandmoversbangalore.com/pre-move-survey-in-bangalore/): Get a free pre-move survey in Bangalore from Harsha Packers and Movers. Accurate, transparent moving quotes with no hidden charges. Book your survey today.

## Why choose Harsha Packers and Movers
- 20+ years of experience (since 2005)
- Government registered and verified
- Transparent, fixed pricing with no hidden charges
- Trained in-house packing crew and own fleet
- Transit insurance available; free pre-move survey
